name: Doctor Nathan Bridgers | Hot Slasher Summer 2024
description:
Something is wrong with the Scientist.

Welcome to Body Horror Tuesday!

Just who is this man, exactly. He's not the Doctor you remember. His smile is too sharp, his skin a touch colder. He is him, but he is not. And yet...

And yet.

Into the mountain pass, I travel. I look beyond me into what is unfamiliar, and I wonder. Shall I meet my end in this cold, alien place? To die as something unfamiliar is terrifying. I hope to be known and remembered as I am, not as I will become.

- Log of Doctor Nathan Bridgers, September 27th, 1982

Content Warnings: Non-Con, Gore, Death, Body Horror, Violence.
creator: merclolz20
